formulas.label: eq0003
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}h_{r , p} = \begin{cases} 1 \text{if} p = \overset{\sim}{p} - \left(r - \overset{\sim}{r}\right) + \underset{\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{}{\left(r^{'} , p^{'}\right) \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{up}}}{\overset{\sim}{r} < r^{'} \leq r , p \leq p^{'} < \overset{\sim}{p}}}{\sum} x_{r^{'} , p^{'}} \text{and} \overset{\sim}{r} \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{up}} \\ & 0 \text{otherwise} \end{cases} , \forall r \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{up}} , r > \overset{\sim}{r} , p \in \mathcal{P} , p < \overset{\sim}{p} ,\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{cases} & a_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) = \left(\bar{a}\right)_{r , p} , d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) = \left(\bar{d}\right)_{r , p} & & \text{if} r \neq \overset{\sim}{r} \text{or} \left(r = \overset{\sim}{r} \text{and} p \neq \overset{\sim}{p}\right) \\ & a_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) = \left(\bar{a}\right)_{r , p} , d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) = \left(\bar{d}\right)_{r , p} + t^{\text{delay}} \left(\omega\right) & & \text{if} r = \overset{\sim}{r} \text{and} p = \overset{\sim}{p} \text{and} \sigma = 1 \\ & a_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) = \left(\bar{a}\right)_{r , p} + t^{\text{delay}} \left(\omega\right) , d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) = \left(\bar{d}\right)_{r , p} + t^{\text{delay}} \left(\omega\right) & & \text{if} r = \overset{\sim}{r} \text{and} p = \overset{\sim}{p} \text{and} \sigma = 0 \end{cases} , \forall r \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{up}} \cup \mathcal{R}^{\text{dn}} , p \in \mathcal{P}_{r} ,

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} \begin{cases} & a_{r , p + 1} \left(\omega\right) - d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) \geq n_{p , p + 1}^{min} - M \left(2 - v_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) - v_{r , p + 1} \left(\omega\right)\right) \text{if} r = \overset{\sim}{r} + 1 \text{and} p + 1 \in \mathcal{P}_{\overset{\sim}{r}} \backslash \left(\mathcal{P}_{\overset{\sim}{r} + 1} \cup \left\{\overset{\sim}{p}\right\}\right) \\ & a_{r , p + 1} \left(\omega\right) - d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) \geq n_{p , p + 1}^{min} + t^{\text{res}} - t^{\text{acc}} k_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) - t^{\text{dec}} k_{r , p + 1} \left(\omega\right) - M \left(2 - v_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) - v_{r , p + 1} \left(\omega\right)\right) \text{otherwise} \end{cases} , \forall n \in \mathcal{R}_{u}^{\text{up}} , p \in \mathcal{P} , p + 1 \in \mathcal{P} \backslash \mathcal{P}_{r} ,\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0073
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} \begin{cases} & a_{r , p - 1} \left(\omega\right) - d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) \leq n_{p , p - 1}^{max} + M \left(2 - v_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) - v_{r , p - 1} \left(\omega\right)\right) \text{if} r = \overset{\sim}{r} + 1 \text{and} p - 1 \in \mathcal{P}_{\overset{\sim}{r}} \backslash \left(\mathcal{P}_{\overset{\sim}{r} + 1} \cup \left\{\overset{\sim}{p}\right\}\right) \\ & a_{r , p - 1} \left(\omega\right) - d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) \leq n_{p , p - 1}^{max} + t^{\text{res}} - t^{\text{acc}} k_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) - t^{\text{dec}} k_{r , p - 1} \left(\omega\right) + M \left(2 - v_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) - v_{r , p - 1} \left(\omega\right)\right) \text{otherwise} \end{cases} , \forall n \in \mathcal{R}_{u}^{\text{dn}} , p \in \mathcal{P} , p - 1 \in \mathcal{P} \backslash \mathcal{P}_{r} .\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}Q^{\text{variation}} \left(\omega\right) = \underset{r \in \mathcal{R}_{l}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \underset{r^{'} \in \mathcal{R}_{l}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \underset{r^{''} \in \mathcal{R}_{l}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \underset{p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{turn}} \backslash \left\{P\right\}}{\sum} \rho_{r^{'} , r , p} \left(\omega\right) \rho_{r , r^{''} , p} \left(\omega\right) \left|d_{r^{'} , p} \left(\omega\right) + d_{r^{''} , p} \left(\omega\right) - 2 d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right)\right| + \\ \underset{r \in \mathcal{R}_{l}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \underset{r^{'} \in \mathcal{R}_{l}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \underset{r^{''} \in \mathcal{R}_{l}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \underset{p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{turn}} \backslash \left\{1\right\}}{\sum} \rho_{r^{'} , r , p} \left(\omega\right) \rho_{r , r^{''} , p} \left(\omega\right) \left|d_{r^{'} , p} \left(\omega\right) + d_{r^{''} , p} \left(\omega\right) - 2 d_{r , p} \left(\omega\right)\right| ,\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0077
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}Q^{\text{backup}} \left(\omega\right) = \underset{\begin{matrix}r \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{up}} \cup \mathcal{R}^{\text{dn}} \\ \left|\mathcal{P}_{r}\right| = 0\end{matrix}}{\sum} \underset{p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{depot}}}{\sum} \psi_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0078
formulas.latex: Q \left(\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{z} , \omega\right) = min \lambda_{1} Q^{\text{deviation}} \left(\omega\right) + \lambda_{2} Q^{\text{cancel}} \left(\omega\right) + \lambda_{3} Q^{\text{variation}} \left(\omega\right) + \lambda_{4} Q^{\text{backup}} \left(\omega\right) .

formulas.label: eq0079
formulas.latex: \text{CVaR}_{\alpha} \left[Q \left(\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{z} , \omega\right)\right] = \underset{\eta \in \mathbb{R}}{min} \left\{\eta + \frac{1}{1 - \alpha} \mathbb{E} \left[\left(Q \left(\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{z} , \omega\right) - \eta\right)_{+}\right]\right\} ,

formulas.label: eq0085
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} \left(\mathbf{SP}\right) & Q \left(\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{z} , \omega\right) = min \lambda_{1} Q^{\text{deviation}} \left(\omega\right) + \lambda_{2} Q^{\text{cancel}} \left(\omega\right) + \lambda_{3} Q^{\text{variation}} \left(\omega\right) + \lambda_{4} Q^{\text{backup}} \left(\omega\right) \\ & \text{s}.\text{t}. \begin{cases} & \text{constraints} \left(5 \right) - \left(41 \right) , \left(74 \right) - \left(77 \right) & & \text{if} l \left(\omega\right) = 1 \\ & \text{constraints} \left(5 \right) - \left(8 \right) , \left(12 \right) , \left(14 \right) - \left(22 \right) , \left(25 \right) - \left(4.2 . 3 \right) , \left(74 \right) - \left(77 \right) & & \text{if} l \left(\omega\right) = 2 \\ & \text{constraints} \left(5 \right) - \left(8 \right) , \left(16 \right) - \left(22 \right) , \left(25 \right) - \left(41 \right) , \left(54 \right) - \left(77 \right) & & \text{if} l \left(\omega\right) = 3 \end{cases} .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0088
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}ϰ_{r , p}^{\text{end}} \left(\omega\right) = \begin{cases} & \underset{r^{'} \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \varphi_{r , r^{'} , p} \left(\omega\right) + \gamma_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) & & \text{if} r \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{up}} \text{and} p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{turn}} \cap \mathcal{P}^{\text{depot}} \\ & \underset{r^{'} \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \varphi_{r , r^{'} , p} \left(\omega\right) + \gamma_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) & & \text{if} r \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{dn}} \text{and} p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{turn}} \cap \mathcal{P}^{\text{depot}} \\ & \underset{r^{'} \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \varphi_{r , r^{'} , p} \left(\omega\right) & & \text{if} r \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{up}} \text{and} p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{turn}} \backslash \mathcal{P}^{\text{depot}} \\ & \underset{r^{'} \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \varphi_{r , r^{'} , p} \left(\omega\right) & & \text{if} r \in \mathcal{R}^{\text{dn}} \text{and} p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{turn}} \backslash \mathcal{P}^{\text{depot}} \\ & \gamma_{r , p} \left(\omega\right) & & \text{if} r \in \mathcal{R} \text{and} p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{depot}} \backslash \mathcal{P}^{\text{turn}} \end{cases} , \forall r \in \mathcal{R} , p \in \mathcal{P}^{\text{turn}} \cup \mathcal{P}^{\text{depot}} .\end{matrix}
